title: P1-5 CLI signpost infrastructure for renames
description: Add a tombstone/signpost layer for retired top-level command names that prints successor guidance and exits non-zero — no silent aliases.
action: Introduce packages/cli/src/lib/command-signposts.ts (or equivalent) mapping retired names → successor (e.g. metrics → audit metrics, context → inspect, whoami/status → info). Wire packages/cli/src/index.ts so unknown/retired argv[0] hits signpost before citty generic failure. Do NOT re-register silent aliases in allCommands. Messages must include exact successor command string and exit code !== 0.

criteria: A signpost table exists in packages/cli/src (file name containing signpost or retired-commands) with at least entries for retired names `metrics` and `context` pointing to successors containing `audit metrics` and `inspect`
packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts allCommands does NOT re-add top-level keys `metrics` or `context` as silent aliases
Behavior test: invoking fabric with retired name prints successor string and process exits non-zero (unit test of signpost resolver and/or CLI surface test)
pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -- signpost || pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -- install-cli-surface exits 0 with new assertions
convergence.verification: rg -n 'signpost|retiredCommands|metrics.*audit metrics|context.*inspect' packages/cli/src; pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -- install-cli-surface
convergence.definition_of_done: Retired command names tombstone with successor guidance; no silent re-aliasing.

files.change: Export map retired → { successor: string, message: string } for metrics, context, whoami, status, scope-explain (and any documented retired top-level names). resolveSignpost(name) returns null if live command.
Before runMain/runCommand, if rawArgs[0] is a signpost, print message + successor via stderr/stdout and exit 1 (or throw handled error); never execute old behavior
Point comments at command-signposts.ts as the tombstone source of truth; do not re-add silent aliases
Add i18n template: 'Command `{retired}` was removed. Use `{successor}` instead.'
Assert resolveSignpost('metrics') successor includes 'audit metrics'; resolveSignpost('doctor') is null; exit semantics documented

implementation: Catalog retired names from comments in commands/index.ts and audit.ts (metrics, context, whoami, status, scope-explain)
Implement pure resolveSignpost without loading heavy command modules
Wire index.ts early-return for signposted names with non-zero exit
Tests: pure unit of map + optional CLI spawn if project has pattern for it
Do not implement silent alias that runs the successor under the old name

success_metrics: signpost table covers known retired names

reference.pattern: Retired alias comments in packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts; audit group as successor for metrics
reference.examples: Comment: top-level metrics alias retired — metrics.ts lives as audit metrics subcommand

rationale.chosen_approach: Tombstone signposts teach migration without reintroducing silent aliases that hide renames.
decision_factors: constraint: signposts only tombstone, no silent alias
citty unknown-command UX is generic — need explicit successor
rationale.tradeoffs: Users must retype successor command — intentional teaching cost

risks: Intercepting argv too early may break nested help — only signpost when rawArgs[0] is exact retired top-level token
i18n missing keys — add en+zh together
